'''Saleeh''' was a [[Jedi Lord]] who served in the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the [[Ruusan campaign]]. Saleeh was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the final battles in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]],<ref name="jvs" /> and the [[Saleeh (planet)|eighth]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]] was named in Saleeh's honor following the conflict.<ref name="Kyle Katarn's Tale">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale5|text=Light and Dark: Kyle Katarn's Tale, Mission 5|int=Kyle Katarn's Tale}}</ref>
